metadata.title: EMC — Branded Corporate Textiles, Turnkey
metadata.description: Manufacturing, branding and packaging of corporate textiles: caps, t-shirts, polos, uniforms. Full cycle — from idea to delivery.

hero.h1: Branded apparel for your team — from idea to packaging
hero.sub: EMC manufactures, brands and packs corporate textiles: caps, t-shirts, polos and uniforms. The whole cycle — production, logo application, quality audit, packaging and logistics — is on us.
hero.segment: For HR teams, marketers, event agencies and procurement

prod.sub: We sew and brand to order — from 50 units, any colour and fabric weight.

0.name: Caps
0.desc: Baseball caps, snapbacks and truckers with embroidered or printed logos.

1.name: T-shirts
1.desc: Cotton and synthetics — any weight, colour and fit for your brand.

2.name: Polos
2.desc: Classic and stretch — for office, retail and events.

3.name: Uniforms
3.desc: Workwear and corporate outfits in ready sets.

trust.sub: We work with companies across Uzbekistan — from startups to large corporations.

cycle.h2: Your path from request to finished batch
cycle.sub: You submit a request — we take the project from there. One manager, a transparent process, no surprises.

0.title: Request & brief
0.desc: You submit a request — we get back within one business day to clarify volume, timeline and preferences.

1.title: Mockup & approval
1.desc: We prepare a mockup with your logo, agree on colours, fabric and run size. Revisions are free.

2.title: Production
2.desc: We launch production: sew, apply branding, and audit every batch.

3.title: Payment & docs
3.desc: We work under contract. 50% prepayment, balance before shipment. Full document package for accounting.

4.title: Delivery
4.desc: We deliver the finished batch to your warehouse or pickup points. Standard lead time — 10–15 business days.

why.sub: No need to assemble a chain of factory, print shop, warehouse and logistics. It is all already inside EMC.

0.title: End-to-end
0.desc: One contract and one point of contact for the whole cycle — from sourcing to packaging.

1.title: Quality control
1.desc: Audits at every step: incoming fabric inspection, sewing, branding and packaging checks. Defect rate under 1%.

2.title: Deadlines that fit
2.desc: Standard run — 10–15 business days. We plan production around your dates and lock deadlines in the contract.

3.title: Any volume
3.desc: Minimum order — from 50 units. We scale up to large runs without losing quality.

form.h2: Tell us the task — we will put together an offer
form.sub: We reply within one business day: call or message you, clarify details and prepare a quote. Have your logo in vector format ready if possible.
form.name: Name
form.successText: Thank you! We will get in touch within a business day with a quote.
form.errorText: Failed to send the request. Please try again.

contacts.tagline: Full-cycle corporate textile manufacturing and branding.
